settings.name: Disable Google Backup
settings.description: Stops Google from backing up your app data, call logs, contacts, and device settings to Google's servers. Your data stays on your phone only.

settings.name: Enable AdGuard Private DNS
settings.description: Routes all DNS queries through AdGuard's encrypted DNS server (dns.adguard.com). This blocks 450,000+ known tracker and ad domains at the network level before they can connect — affects every app on the phone.

settings.name: Set AdGuard DNS Hostname
settings.description: Sets the encrypted DNS hostname to dns.adguard.com. Works together with the Private DNS mode setting — both must be applied.

settings.name: Stop Google Connectivity Pings
settings.description: Android pings Google servers every time you connect to WiFi to check internet connectivity. This tells Google your location and WiFi network every time. Disabling this stops those pings — your WiFi still works normally.

settings.name: Disable Location Services
settings.description: Turns off GPS and network-based location completely. All apps lose the ability to determine your physical location until you re-enable it. You will need to manually turn location back on for apps like navigation.

settings.name: Disable Ad Tracking
settings.description: Tells Google and advertising networks to stop using your Advertising ID for cross-app tracking. Apps can still show ads but cannot build a personal profile linking your activity across different apps.

settings.name: Stop WiFi Background Scanning
settings.description: Android scans for nearby WiFi networks in the background even when WiFi is turned off, to help apps determine your location. Disabling this stops your phone from building a database of every WiFi network you walk past.

settings.name: Disable Automatic Error Reporting
settings.description: Stops Android from automatically sending crash reports and app error data to Google and Samsung when apps crash. These reports can contain sensitive context about what you were doing when the crash occurred.

settings.name: Disable Dropbox Crash Logs
settings.description: Android's internal Dropbox service (unrelated to the app) collects detailed system event logs and crash dumps. Disabling it stops this data accumulation.

settings.name: Block Facebook Clipboard Access
settings.description: Prevents Facebook from reading your clipboard in the background. Facebook was caught reading clipboard content even when the app was not in use. This AppOps deny survives app updates.

settings.name: Block Facebook Wake Lock
settings.description: Prevents Facebook from holding a wake lock that keeps your phone's CPU running when the screen is off. This is Facebook's primary battery drain mechanism outside active use.

settings.name: Block Instagram Clipboard Access
settings.description: Prevents Instagram from reading your clipboard in the background. Instagram (also owned by Meta) uses the same clipboard-reading behavior as Facebook.

settings.name: Block Facebook Background Execution
settings.description: Prevents Facebook from running any code in the background when you are not actively using it. The app can still work normally when you open it, but it cannot execute silently while you use other apps.
